creator: koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Marcus, is this still an issue since the recent
"great-python-refactor-of-2013" that has the lang/pythonXX ports
installing version-suffixed versions of files?

Eg:

bin/2to3-%%PYVER%%
bin/idle3-%%PYVER%%
bin/pydoc3-%%PYVER%%
bin/python%%PYVER%%
bin/python%%PYVER%%-config
bin/python-shared%%PYVER%%
bin/python-shared%%PYVER%%-config
bin/python%%PYVER%%%%PYABIVER%%
bin/python%%PYVER%%%%PYABIVER%%-config
lib/lib%%PYTHON_VERSION%%%%PYABIVER%%.a
lib/lib%%PYTHON_VERSION%%%%PYABIVER%%.so
lib/lib%%PYTHON_VERSION%%%%PYABIVER%%.so.1
libdata/pkgconfig/python-%%PYVER%%.pc
